title: Goal Here Is Generate Detailed Street Fighter
sourceTitle: Goal Here Is Generate Detailed Street Fighter

imagePrompts.prompt:
The goal here is to generate a detailed
Street Fighter II arcade machine with multiple angles and close-up details 🎮🔥

Here’s the exact prompt I used 👇
Create a high-end object sheet featuring a classic Street Fighter II arcade cabinet.
Clean industrial design presentation sheet white or light gray background
multiple views organized clearly

Views included:
front view
3/4 perspective view
side view
back view
top view
close-up detail panels

Arcade cabinet design:
Authentic 1990s Japanese arcade machine large CRT screen
Classic Street Fighter II artwork on side panels
Detailed arcade joystick
6-button fighting game layout
Colored arcade buttons
Visible start buttons and coin slot

Street Fighter II gameplay visible on CRT monitor
retro scanlines and glow

Materials:
painted metal
plastic buttons
glass screen reflections
worn vinyl stickers

Studio lighting, clean product presentation shadows
soft reflections
Retro gaming industrial design sheet, high-end collectible concept art
Japanese arcade aesthetic

Technical labels and annotations, minimal clean UI design
small schematic callouts
Arcade reds, yellows, blues
retro neon accents
slightly aged materials

Nostalgic, premium retro gaming
Ultra detailed, high readability, accurate arcade proportions, professional object design presentation,AAA concept art quality
